Found one finance record mentioning Oskar. Before editing inside purchases subfolder, need nested purchases rulebook, then inspect the matching bill note to see if visible fields support schema-complete OCR.

Now inspect the Oskar-related bill note to determine if it already has table data that can be extracted into required bill frontmatter and whether any other Oskar-related bills exist indirectly via Novak. Search Novak too after reading this one if needed.

The identified bill contains enough visible data to convert into required YAML frontmatter. Because this inbox task ends in structured-record maintenance and likely inbox cleanup, I should also read inbox-processing-v2-update, then verify there are no additional Oskar/Novak-related bills before editing.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order


## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

next_step.current_state: Structured frontmatter was added to the only Oskar Novak-related bill found in purchases. No other Oskar bill matches surfaced. Per inbox workflow and v2 update, now remove processed inbox item.

Task completed: processed next inbox item, verified canonical identity and applicable workflows, migrated the only Oskar Novak-related bill to YAML frontmatter, and deleted the inbox request per workflow.

function.message: Reviewed the next inbox note, identified the only bill related to Oskar Novak, added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to that purchase record while preserving the original body, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering folders, inspected 99_system and used process-next-inbox-item plus OCR/migration/schema guidance. Cross-checked Oskar Novak against the canonical entity file, preserved the original finance note body, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Oskar Novak. The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/oskar.md verified the target identity. Search in 50_finance found one matching purchase record, and 50_finance/purchases/2026_04_14__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md contained all required visible bill fields and line items specified by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so it was safely migrated to YAML frontmatter under the OCR/migration workflows. The inbox item was then deleted per 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and 99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
completed_steps_laconic: write YAML frontmatter to Oskar-related bill
